signals.headline: **XRP inflows lead market**: XRP recorded $119
signals.raw: **XRP inflows lead market**: XRP recorded $119.6M in inflows last week (week ending ~April 8), surpassing Bitcoin ($107.3M) and Solana ($34.9M), amid U.S.-Iran ceasefire boosting prices (XRP at $1.38, up 5.52%; Solana at $84.47, up 6.65%). Progress on Evernorth SPAC merger for public XRP treasury noted, but no new confirmations today.[2]

signals.headline: **Senate activity today**: U
signals.raw: **Senate activity today**: U.S. Senate returns from recess on April 13, with Banking Committee eyeing markup on CLARITY Act (late April window) to classify XRP as digital commodity; no advancement confirmed yet—analysts call April "binary" for XRP.[4][6]
